chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-2268 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection No.1 to 3. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.09.2025 Mr. Ali Haider, Saleem, Addl. P.G, Sindh. -------------------- No one is in attendance on behalf for the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. Furthermore, it transpires that certain amendments has been made in the Sindh Control of Narcotics Substances Act 2024, providing for Bail Applications to be entertained by the fora below. As such, the instant Petition stands dismissed, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
